global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a game interface and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to play a game with friends.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Game grid layout
elements.description: A grid layout featuring four squares with dots, representing a game interface, is centered in the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Beat your rivals' is prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Play with friends tonight'.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'PixelForge' appears at the top left in a bold, white font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in white against a blue background.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '$4.99' in white text at the bottom left.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the form of a dot is positioned within the game grid.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element in the form of a dot is positioned within the game grid.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unidentifiable element located in the center of the ad.

elements.description: Another small, unidentifiable element located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unidentifiable element located at the top of the ad.
